message: Jake
Meryl
I had to report on my daughter, so I came to the St. Regis Hotel.
I didn't even notice this calm atmosphere at the moment.
Did you bring good news?
It seems like you've visited a few times.
Could it be good news?
Well,
I’d like a detailed explanation of what that expression means.
Oh, if it isn't the useless detective.
Look
Talk
Report
Listen
Think
Move
System
Surroundings
About the filming
About my daughter
About Guy
About Cindy
About Director Fabar
About Jennifer
About
About Guy
About Cindy

To another place
Save
Exit the game
Today's room doesn't smell like alcohol.
It's as if there's a picture-perfect scene right in front of me.
I can almost see the awkward atmosphere hanging in the air.
Her expression is the same as ever, but her gaze is as cold as ice.
Only because she's not drunk now, her frustration seems to be quietly swelling inside her.
Is the slight trembling in her glass-holding hand due to alcoholism, or is it because of anger?
Anyway, I want you to report first.
So, what's going on now?
That is...
I got to meet midwife Anna.
Well, that's wonderful. And?
So, I found out that Ariana was taken in by the Kleiberg couple.
That means she will be found soon. That's great.
No, it's not that; I'm very sorry, but her foster parents passed away shortly after taking her in.
Well, that means there's no one to get in the way of adopting Ariana. Nice.
Please listen to the rest of the story.
After the Kleiberg couple passed away, Ariana’s whereabouts are unknown.
Huh.
Hmm.
So? What does that mean?
What do you mean by 'what does that mean'?
Just because we don't know her whereabouts doesn't mean she's dead; she might be living happily somewhere.
Yes, I can't deny that possibility.
I want to see Ariana soon.
You understand, right?
You've just returned to square one.
My request remains unchanged. Yes, after coming this far, it's a matter of stubbornness.
I understand the circumstances. However, I'm not giving up.
Not giving up means...
Is the request ongoing?
Of course. You would be happier if there was a request, too, right?
I would be happy to take your request, but this time,
Oh dear, you're not saying you're going to quit now, are you?
If that's the case, then no matter what, you have to find her. Even if it takes going to the ends of the earth!
That's a bit unreasonable.
What do you mean unreasonable? Isn't that your job? I just want you to put in a little effort.
I'm looking forward to seeing my daughter, but I wonder when that will actually be.
That's not relevant right now. Just hurry up and report back.
This isn't a situation for filming, you understand that, right?
Is that alright?
If you think so, then quickly bring my daughter here.
Filming will be a breeze; it'll be done in no time. So it's fine, no need to rush.
Anyway, I just want you to report back first.
Oh, poor Ariana.
She must have had a tough life after we parted ways.
If you had raised her properly, it wouldn't have turned out this way.
Oh, I wouldn't know about that. Even though she succeeded as an actress, who knows what she would have been doing if Ariana had been by my side back then.
Even if that were the case, I think it would have been better if we had lived together.
But that's hindsight, isn't it?
I'm glad. Now I can confidently reclaim my daughter. It's a happy thing not to have to worry about anyone getting in the way.
That will be after we find Ms. Ariana.
Oh, you're going to search for her, so it should be fine, right? I have a high opinion of you, you know. Heh heh.
Even if you manage to find her, will she be willing to?
Ah,
Of course she'll be fine. After all, I'm her birth mother. A big-time actress, at that. Heh heh heh heh.
I just want to see my daughter's face quickly.
I don't care about that kind of man, let's focus on the report first.
I don't care about a baseball idiot like Guy. The only thing that matters to me is Ariana.
Can you please stop talking about things that don't concern me?
More importantly, what about the report?
My daughter is the priority, not some failure of a talent.
Anyway, I want to hear the report first.
I don't care about Martin right now. My daughter, Ariana, is what's important.
I don't even want to see Martin's face.
Anyway, I want to hear the report first.
I don't want to talk about that kind of woman.
More than that, please bring my daughter here quickly.
Let's finish the report quickly.
That's for sure.
It's just that my job has gone back to square one.
It means.
that observation is correct.
But it's incredible. Saying that the foster parent passed away means no more obstacles.
She might actually be a very terrifying woman.
In this situation,
will we be able to produce results that satisfy?
Right now,
reporting to them is the priority.
Oh, my head hurts just thinking about Guy, and searching for Ariana is getting even more difficult.
Right now,
reporting to them is the priority.
That's not what matters right now at all.
Right now,
reporting to them is the priority.
More importantly,
I'm so worried about whether we can find her daughter.
That's what I can't stop worrying about.
Right now
the priority is to report to (someone).
I don't care about Jennifer at all right now.
I
said goodbye and left the room.
※※※ It's a bug ※※※
